title: Three-way catalyst system structure description - Overview

blocks.text: Three-way catalyst system structure description - Overview

For cleaner emissions, LAF sensor/secondary O 2 A catalytic converter is installed directly under the cylinder head in conjunction with air-fuel ratio feedback control using a sensor. This catalytic converter is a monolithic catalytic converter with excellent low-temperature activity.
The catalytic converter catalyzer uses a three-way catalyst with palladium and rhodium-based precious metals supported on a ceramic surface.
